sector_profile.company_description: Sailfish Boats designs and manufactures high-quality family-friendly fishing boats, offering a diverse range of models including center console and dual console boats for offshore and inshore fishing.
sector_profile.sector_summary: The manufacturing sector for recreational and fishing boats involves precision engineering, marine-grade materials, and advanced production technologies to produce durable, high-performance vessels tailored to diverse aquatic environments.
rd_focus_examples: Designing new hull shapes using CAD and hydrodynamic software
Testing novel composite materials for lighter, stronger boats
Automating fiberglass layup to reduce production times and defects
Prototyping dual-console configurations with enhanced ergonomics
Developing advanced resin curing processes for improved durability
Integrating high-efficiency engines with emission control technology
Implementing sensor-based quality control during assembly
Simulating boat stability and safety under various conditions
Advancing onboard electronics for fishing and navigation assistance
Optimizing manufacturing workflows using ERP and MES tools
sector_profile.rd_rationale: Given the complexity and technical demands of boat design and manufacturing, R&D efforts in design optimization, material innovation, and production process improvements are highly plausible and beneficial for competitive advantage.

activities: Creating new hull designs to improve stability and fuel efficiency
Developing innovative boat configurations and features
Using hydrodynamic simulations to optimize performance
Prototyping and testing new boat models
Researching advanced composite materials for weight reduction
Developing improved resin formulations for durability
Enhancing corrosion resistance of marine-grade components
Testing new fiberglass layup techniques
Implementing automation and robotics to enhance precision
Optimizing resin infusion and curing processes
Improving CNC machining workflows for part accuracy
Developing quality control methodologies using sensor data
Testing and integrating high-performance marine engines
Developing electrical and control systems for automated features
Enhancing fuel systems for efficiency and emissions control
Innovating on onboard safety and navigation systems

narrative.ga_jtc_intro: The GA JTC offers a dollar-for-dollar reduction of state income tax liability when creating new jobs in certain areas. Counties are designated Tier 1 through Tier 4, with Military Zones, Less Developed Census Tracts (LDCT), and Opportunity Zones often supporting lower thresholds and larger benefits.
narrative.ga_jtc_note: Sailfish Boats Georgia locations with corresponding tier designations and estimated credit benefits are shown below based on county tier and special designations.
narrative.retraining_intro: The GA Retraining Tax Credit can provide up to 50% of eligible retraining costs, including wages of trainees, up to $1,250 per employee per year.
narrative.retraining_context: Below are industry-specific software and equipment categories with applicable programs. If implemented and employees were retrained to use them, these categories may support GA RTC claims.
